message:
feat(FJ-P2C-008-E): comprehensive unit + property tests for LAX primitives

Added 62 new tests (38→100 total):
- NaN/Inf edge cases: NaN propagation, log(0)=-Inf, sqrt(-1)=NaN,
  exp(-Inf)=0, neg(-0)=-0, abs(-0)=+0, NaN comparison semantics
- Type promotion: i64+f64→f64, int pow through float
- Broadcasting: scalar+vector, vector+scalar for binary/comparison ops
- Error paths: arity mismatch, shape mismatch, unsupported primitives
- Reduction edge cases: scalar identity, f64 products, Inf/NaN in reductions
- Tensor manipulation errors: reshape size mismatch, invalid permutation,
  slice OOB, concatenate scalars
- Trig: sin(0)=0, cos(0)=1, sin(pi)≈0, sin(NaN)=NaN
- Vector-level transcendentals: exp/floor/rsqrt on vectors
- 11 property tests: commutativity (add/mul/max/min), neg involution,
  abs non-negative, reshape roundtrip, reduce_sum/prod manual match,
  eq reflexive, add-sub inverse

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
